betterquesting:10.desc:8:
§6Starmetal§f

§aA unique natural alloy from outer space — obscenely dense, hard, and reactive!§f

§bStarmetal§f is a unique natural alloy from outer space, found in asteroids, meteorites, and other rocky space bodies. It can also be synthesized on Earth so you don't need to rely on meteors.

§6Production§f:
§b• Meteor Mining§f — found in meteors or mined via Asteroid Mining Ship
§b• Blast Furnace§f — combine §bSaturnite§f + §bMeteorite Powder§f → §eStarmetal§f (reliable method)

Not much is known about this alloy, but it is obscenely heavy, dense, and hard. It creates a violent and radioactive reaction with moon-rock — the basis for Trottenheimer's Folly's immense power.

§6Key Uses§f:
§b• Schrabidium Clusters§f — exotic material crafting
§b• Radiation-Powered Engine§f — generates electricity from static/radiation
§b• Tom's Final Stage§f — required component
§b• Tesla Coils§f — static electricity generation
§b• Artillery Shells§f — increases kinetic damage potential
§b• Coated Bullets§f — armor-piercing effects + heavy metal poisoning

§eTip§f: The Blast Furnace synthesis is the most reliable source. Saturnite is produced in the mid-game — make sure you have a steady supply before attempting large-scale starmetal production!
